payload.answer: Sam left Goldman last month and joined Point72; he still listens to Bill Evans but lately more early Coltrane; they also planned to catch up about AI infrastructure, and Sam asked Daniele to send an article.
citations: For context, Daniele: Still at Goldman? Sam: No, I left Goldman last month and joined Point72.
Daniele: Still listening to Bill Evans? Sam: Yes, but lately more early Coltrane.
Daniele: We should catch up about AI infra. Sam: Definitely, send me that article.

entity_resolution.reason: No entity disambiguation is required from the transcript.

memory_cards.statement: Sam said he left Goldman last month and joined Point72.
Sam said he still listens to Bill Evans, but lately has been listening more to early Coltrane.
Daniele and Sam indicated they should catch up about AI infrastructure, and Sam asked Daniele to send him the article.

details: Used cautious wording for the follow-up item.

repair_options: If needed, split the follow-up into separate cards for the AI infra catch-up and the article request.
